zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Fitz Camerarius於1108年12月出生在英國英格蘭越可爾里士滿時，他的父親Hugh Camerarius23歲，母親Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain12歲。他於大約1134年與Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1165年在英國越可爾里士滿享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Fitz Camerarius于1108年12月出生在英国英格兰越可爾里士滿时，他的父亲Hugh Camerarius23岁，母亲Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain12岁。他于大约1134年与Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1165年在英国越可爾里士滿享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fitz Camerarius was born in December 1108, in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Camerarius, was 23 and his mother, Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain, was 12. He married Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius about 1134, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1165, in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Fitz Camerarius est né en décembre 1108, à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Camerarius, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius environ 1134, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1165, à Richmond, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Fitz Camerarius im Dezember 1108 in Richmond, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Camerarius 23 und seine Mutter Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain 12. Er hat um 1134 in England, United Kingdom Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1165 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Richmond, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fitz Camerarius è nato il nel dicembre 1108 nel Richmond, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hugh Camerarius, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius circa 1134, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1165, nel Richmond, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Fitz Camerariusが1108年12月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドで生まれた時，父Hugh Camerariusは23歳，母Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlainは12歳であった。約1134年にイギリスイギリスでMrs Robert Fitz Camerariusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1165年にイギリスヨークシュアイアリチモンドで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fitz Camerarius(이)가 1108년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Camerarius(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1134년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1165년 영국 요르크실르 리ch몽에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fitz Camerarius nasceu em dezembro de 1108, em Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Camerarius, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius aproximadamente 1134, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1165, em Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fitz Camerarius родился декабрь 1108 г. в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Camerarius было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius около 1134 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1165 г. в местности ричмонд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Fitz Camerarius nació en diciembre de 1108, en Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Camerarius, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hugh the Chamberlain, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Mrs Robert Fitz Camerarius aproximadamente 1134, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1165, en Richmond, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
